import pickle
from flask import request

def load_session():
    data = request.cookies.get('session')
    obj = pickle.loads(data.encode('latin1'))
    return obj

import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from flask import request

def parse_xml():
    data = request.data
    tree = ET.fromstring(data)
    return tree.find('user').text

code_snippet:
from flask import request
import subprocess

SECRET_KEY = 'my-very-secret-key-12345'

def run_report():
    report_name = request.form.get('report')
    cmd = f'generate_report.sh {report_name}'
    subprocess.call(cmd, shell=True)
    return 'Done'
